MINI MINUTES: Defendant Marjorie Jean's Motion to Remove Case From Arbitration Hearing List and Vacate Appointment of Arbitrators is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is removed from Judicial Arbitration. Order signed. 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give Notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Proceedings not reported. (610)
